title: bulbophyllum rivulare
intro: Bulbophyllum rivulare, also known as the Swamp Bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Bulbophyllum. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
